message:
feat(ftui): clipboard integration via OSC52 with fallback chain (2noh9.3.17)

Replace manual subprocess-based clipboard with ftui-extras Clipboard::auto()
which provides: OSC52 (works over SSH), multiplexer passthrough (tmux/screen),
then external tool fallback (pbcopy/wl-copy/xclip/xsel). Add toast notifications
on copy success/failure. New keybindings: Ctrl+Y (copy path), Ctrl+Shift+C
(copy content). Add CopyQuery message variant for query-to-clipboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","title":"Task: Export modal on ftui (HTML export + encryption + progress + open-in-browser)","description":"## Goal
Port the interactive export UX currently available in the Ratatui TUI:
- export current conversation as self-contained HTML
- optional encryption (password / password-stdin style flow where appropriate)
- show progress + completion info (output_path, file_size, encrypted)
- open in browser option

## Notes
- Reuse existing export engine: `src/html_export` + `src/export.rs`.
- UI should be purely orchestration + progress rendering.

## Tests
- Unit tests for export state machine.
- E2E test: in a temp data dir with fixtures, export HTML and assert output exists and is non-empty.
- Logging: on failure, attach export progress logs like existing playwright E2E does.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Export behaves identically to current TUI for default paths and encryption toggles.
- No export UI prompts occur in headless mode.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:02.881561070Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:23:49.639979780Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:23:49.639891425Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["export","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:02.881561070Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:46.852159876Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.139802539Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","title":"Task: Update assistant UI on ftui (banner/modal, upgrade/skip/release-notes actions)","description":"## Goal
Port the update-check experience:
- detect when a newer release exists
- show an in-TUI banner/modal
- support actions: upgrade, skip this version, view notes, dismiss

## Notes
- Existing logic lives in `src/update_check.rs` and is already integrated into Ratatui UI.
- Headless mode must never prompt.

## Tests
- Unit tests for banner state transitions.
- E2E test: inject a fake update info and verify UI renders the banner in a snapshot.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Banner appears only in interactive mode and is dismissible with ESC.
- Actions behave safely (no destructive action without explicit confirmation).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:12.965619165Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:19:18.920511999Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","updates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.436452092Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:12.965619165Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.723585015Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","title":"Task: Semantic search model manager UI on ftui (availability, download/install, progress, policy)","description":"## Goal
Port the semantic model setup experience (currently integrated into Ratatui TUI):
- show semantic availability state
- allow download/install of model files (when policy allows)
- show progress (bytes, steps)
- handle failures gracefully

## Constraints
- No automatic downloads in headless mode.
- Respect existing env/policy behavior (`CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER`, headless constraints described in README).

## Notes
- Reuse existing implementation modules:
  - `src/search/model_download.rs`
  - `src/search/model_manager.rs`

## Tests
- Unit tests for semantic availability state machine.
- Snapshot tests for download modal/progress rendering.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can set up semantic search entirely from within the TUI.
- Failures provide actionable guidance (missing files list, expected paths).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:24.423004893Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:47:36.586546862Z","close_reason":"Implemented semantic model manager UI for ftui: consent dialog (62x14 centered modal with D/H/Esc options), download progress display, SemanticAvailability state machine integration, SearchModeCycled gating, status bar semantic indicator (SEM/sem*/DL...), key interception for consent dialog. Added 14 unit tests + 3 snapshot tests + 2 blessed snapshots. All 2487 lib tests and 103 snapshot tests pass, clippy clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","semantic","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.007721141Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:24.423004893Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.310533342Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","title":"Task: Mouse support on ftui (hit testing, click-to-select, scroll panes, pill interactions)","description":"## Goal
Preserve and improve mouse support:
- click to select results
- scroll results/detail panes
- click pills/breadcrumbs to edit/remove

## Implementation Notes
- Use ftui frame hit grid registration.
- All actions must remain keyboard accessible (mouse is optional).

## Tests
- Simulation tests: inject mouse events and ensure correct Msg/actions.
- Snapshot tests for hit regions are not directly visible, but we can test:
  - selected state after click

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse capture is enabled only when supported and cleaned up on exit.
- Mouse behavior does not interfere with terminal scrollback in inline mode.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:33.757395033Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.240899604Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","mouse","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.671831919Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:33.757395033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.240827469Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.955386040Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","title":"Task: Source provenance display + source filter UX on ftui (local/remote, per-host menus)","description":"## Goal
Port and polish multi-source UX:
- show source indicators in results (e.g., `[laptop]`)
- support cycling source filter (all → local → remote → all)
- support per-source selection menu

## Notes
- `README.md` documents `F11`/`Shift+F11` source filtering.
- Ensure provenance fields (`source_id`, `source_kind`, `workspace_original`) are visible in detail view/raw view.

## Tests
- Unit tests for source filter state transitions.
- Snapshot tests where mixed local+remote results show correct badges.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Source filtering works consistently with CLI flags (`cass search --source ...`).
- UI makes it obvious where a conversation originated.","notes":"Claimed by EmeraldBrook; starting source provenance + source filter UX on ftui.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:34:27.126990879Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","sources","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.524316108Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.787715127Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","title":"Task: Theme + style system implementation on ftui (presets, opt-outs, contrast/a11y patterns)","description":"## Goal
Implement the real ftui theme system used by all widgets:
- theme presets (dark/light/high-contrast + any existing cass presets)
- role-aware styling (user/assistant/tool/system)
- zebra stripes, gutters, highlights
- opt-out env vars (NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_ICONS, CASS_NO_GRADIENT, etc.)
- a11y patterns (when `CASS_A11Y=1`) so color is not sole carrier of meaning

## Notes
- This is the implementation counterpart of the spec work in `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2`.
- Prefer `ftui_style::{Theme, ThemeBuilder, StyleSheet, ColorProfile}`.

## Tests
- Unit tests for contrast computations and preset invariants.
- Snapshot tests across presets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All core panes use the same token source (no ad-hoc per-widget colors).
- Truecolor terminals get premium theme; 8/16-color terminals get safe fallback.","notes":"## Completed scope

Implemented the ftui style system and wired it into the live ftui TUI view path.

### 1) New ftui style-system module
- Added `src/ui/style_system.rs` with:
  - `UiThemePreset` (`Dark`, `Light`, `Catppuccin`, `Dracula`, `Nord`, `HighContrast`)
  - `StyleOptions` env-driven opt-outs:
    - `NO_COLOR`, `CASS_NO_COLOR`
    - `CASS_NO_ICONS`
    - `CASS_NO_GRADIENT`
    - `CASS_A11Y`
    - optional profile override via `CASS_COLOR_PROFILE`
  - Color-profile downgrade flow (`TrueColor` / `Ansi256` / `Ansi16` / `Mono`) over entire theme slot set
  - `StyleContext` + semantic `StyleSheet` tokens for app/pane/text/status/row/role/gutter styling
  - A11y role-marker fallback strategy to ensure color is not the sole signal

### 2) App wiring to use semantic style tokens
- Updated `src/ui/app.rs`:
  - Added style state in `CassApp` (`theme_preset`, `style_options`)
  - Added `resolved_style_context()` and `selected_hit()` helpers
  - Integrated style context with theme toggle and state-load flows
  - Implemented actual ftui `view()` rendering using semantic tokens (query/header, results pane, detail pane, status line)
  - Added responsive breakpoint + density-aware row rendering helpers

This moves ftui rendering off ad-hoc colors and onto a centralized token source.

### 3) Acceptance-criteria alignment
- Presets + opt-outs: implemented.
- Contrast/a11y patterning: implemented in style context + role markers.
- Truecolor vs fallback profiles: implemented via downgrade pass.
- Core pane token source: implemented in current ftui view rendering path.

## Validation
- `cargo fmt --check` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo test style_system::tests --lib` ✅ (8 tests)
- `cargo test ui::app::tests --lib` ✅ (11 tests)

## Notes
- Existing workspace is multi-agent and contains unrelated in-flight changes outside this bead; this work was kept focused to `src/ui/style_system.rs` and `src/ui/app.rs` for style-system delivery.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:56:13.274010365Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:42:17.883013681Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","style","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.553479922Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.962901148Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:39.370250843Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","title":"Task: FocusGraph navigation system on ftui (directional traversal, focus trapping, focus ring)","description":"## Why
The current TUI uses a simple FocusRegion enum (Results/Detail) with manual tracking and focus_flash_until timer. ftui provides a proper FocusGraph for navigation that handles the complexity of modals, nested widgets, and directional movement.

## What
Replace FocusRegion with ftui_widgets::focus::FocusGraph. Define focus nodes:
1. **SearchBar** (text input focus)
2. **FilterPills** (each pill focusable for edit/delete)
3. **ResultsList** (item selection focus)
4. **DetailPane** (scroll focus)
5. **CommandPalette** (modal focus trap)
6. **ExportModal** (modal focus trap)
7. **HelpOverlay** (modal focus trap)

FocusGraph handles:
- Directional navigation (Up from Results → SearchBar, Down from SearchBar → Results)
- Tab/Shift+Tab cycling through all nodes
- FocusTrap ensures modal focus doesn't leak to background widgets
- Visible focus ring indicator (colored border or glow effect) on focused widget

## Implementation
- Use frame.register_hit() for each focusable region
- FocusTrap activated when any modal is open
- Focus ring rendered as themed border highlight (uses agent accent colors)
- Replaces manual focus_region tracking and focus_flash_until timer

## Tests
- Unit: FocusGraph navigation sequence tests (Tab cycles, directional moves)
- Unit: Modal focus trapping prevents escape
- Snapshot: Focus ring renders correctly in each theme
- E2E: Full keyboard navigation flow (search → results → detail → modal → back)

## Acceptance Criteria
- All existing focus transitions preserved (no regression)
- Tab order matches logical UI flow
- Modals trap focus; Esc releases
- Focus ring visible in all 6+ themes with WCAG contrast
- CASS_DISABLE_ANIMATIONS=1 disables focus transition animations

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation must exist first)
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:37:26.454045275Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:29.107442839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:26.431410925Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","title":"Task: Add ftui-harness snapshot infrastructure to cass (goldens, BLESS workflow, diff output)","description":"## Goal
Adopt `ftui-harness` for UI snapshot/golden testing in cass.

## Deliverables
- `ftui-harness` dev-dependency.
- A standard snapshot test helper that:
  - renders a view into a `ftui_render::Buffer`
  - asserts snapshot with helpful diffs
  - supports `BLESS=1` to update snapshots
- Snapshot organization and naming conventions aligned with existing `tests/` style.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Running `BLESS=1 cargo test -p coding-agent-search` updates/creates snapshots.
- Snapshot diffs are readable and point at the failing view/state.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:30.387881823Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:08:36.886783754Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:08:36.886753027Z","close_reason":"Completed: added ftui-harness dev-dependency, shared snapshot helpers, baseline snapshot tests and golden files","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:38.791293377Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:30.387881823Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","title":"Task: Migrate existing Ratatui UI tests to ftui equivalents (ui_snap.rs, tui.rs internal tests)","description":"## Goal
Replace Ratatui-specific tests with ftui-based tests so CI continues to validate UI behavior after the migration.

## Inventory (current)
- `tests/ui_snap.rs` uses `ratatui::style::{Color, Modifier}` and ThemePalette.
- `src/ui/tui.rs` includes tests using `ratatui::backend::TestBackend`.

## Deliverables
- Tests rewritten to use:
  - `ftui_style` color/style types
  - `ftui_render::Buffer` for rendering
  - `ftui-harness` for snapshots
- Any remaining style invariants ported (highlight bg present, stripe contrast, etc.).

## Acceptance Criteria
- No test depends on Ratatui once migration is complete.
- Test coverage for theming/highlighting/striping is preserved or improved.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:52.118034540Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:25:09.429384002Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:25:09.429338437Z","close_reason":"Migrated external test files (ui_snap.rs, ui_components.rs, regression_behavioral.rs) to import Color/Modifier/Style/Buffer/Rect/etc from the crate's own re-exports instead of ratatui directly. Added pub use re-exports in theme.rs and widgets.rs. All 50 ui_snap tests + 54 ftui_harness tests pass. Internal tui.rs rendering tests remain ratatui-based since the module itself uses ratatui and will be deleted with 2noh9.6.1.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","migration","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.242978282Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:52.118034540Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.015730760Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.3","title":"Task: Determinism + flicker detection tests for cass TUI (ftui-harness)","description":"## Goal
Use ftui-harness to validate:
- deterministic rendering (same state → same buffer)
- minimal diffs (avoid full redraws)
- flicker detection (detect regressions in presenter/diff strategy)

## Deliverables
- Harness tests for:
  - key screens (main search, detail modal, export modal)
  - repeated renders of the same model
  - diff size budgets

## Acceptance Criteria
- A regression that increases diff size dramatically fails tests.
- Resize storms are handled without panic; harness has a resize_storm module we should use.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:07.167712412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:45:15.222345020Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:45:15.222315014Z","close_reason":"Implemented 29 tests in ftui_harness_snapshots.rs: determinism (8), zero-diff (3), flicker detection (5), resize storm (6), breakpoint transitions (1), CassApp snapshots (6). Fixed render_debug_overlay placement. All 83 tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.692604327Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:07.167712412Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.463132560Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","title":"Task: PTY-driven e2e tests for interactive ftui TUI (key flows + terminal cleanup)","description":"## Goal
Add PTY-driven end-to-end tests that exercise the *real* interactive TUI:
- verify raw mode and terminal cleanup
- verify key flows (search, open detail, export modal, quit)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-pty` utilities if they fit; otherwise use a stable PTY crate already in the ecosystem.
- Use the existing `tests/util/e2e_log` PhaseTracker pattern for detailed logs.
- Capture artifacts on failure:
  - last N frames (via render trace)
  - event stream
  - stderr logs

## Test Scenarios (minimum)
1. Launch + immediate quit (`Esc`), assert terminal restored.
2. Type query, wait for results, open detail, close detail, quit.
3. Trigger help overlay, ensure it renders and dismisses.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Tests run reliably in CI (no flakes).
- Failures include enough artifacts to debug without rerunning.","notes":"Fresh-eyes bugfix pass: fixed Codex fixture to modern envelope format in tests/e2e_tui_smoke_flows.rs so indexed search has real hits; hardened PTY flows against lock poisoning; adjusted search/detail PTY flows to submit query before detail-open attempt and handle one-or-two ESC unwind paths; added output-growth helper and clearer regression assertions.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:22.029007193Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:33:46.121845488Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.916369467Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:40.137504213Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:40.365647113Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:22.029007193Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.5","title":"Task: Update existing cass e2e/smoke tests to target ftui TUI (retain PhaseTracker logging)","description":"## Goal
Keep CI coverage continuous by updating:
- `tests/e2e_index_tui.rs`
- `tests/tui_smoke.rs`
- `tests/tui_headless_smoke.rs`

## Requirements
- Preserve the detailed logging and artifact capture patterns.
- Ensure tests do not rely on Ratatui types/backends.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All existing TUI-related tests pass after the ftui migration.
- Failure logs remain actionable (stdout/stderr tails, metrics).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:41.731855833Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:45:58.046417493Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:45:58.046393318Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:40.617771617Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:41.731855833Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","title":"Task: Performance guardrails for ftui TUI (benchmarks for frame time, diff size, search latency)","description":"## Goal
Prevent performance regressions in the new TUI.

## Deliverables
- Benchmarks / tests that track:
  - view render time for key screens
  - diff size/bytes emitted per frame
  - search pipeline latency under typing
- A documented budget (ms and bytes) with thresholds.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A 2x regression in render time or diff size fails CI (or at least fails a perf test job).
- Budgets are realistic and measured on representative datasets.","notes":"Fresh-eyes pass on PTY/perf guard tests: fixed Codex fixture format to modern envelope so search hits are real; added fixture regression assertion (total_matches>0); adjusted interactive flow to submit query before detail-open attempt; hardened ESC unwind logic to handle modal-close vs direct-quit paths without flakiness.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:54.197196741Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:33:58.997998626Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:40.845742857Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:41.068094061Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:54.197196741Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","title":"Task: CI failure artifacts for TUI tests (trace bundles, last-frames, event streams, logs)","description":"## Goal
When any TUI-related test fails, we should have a "forensic bundle" to debug quickly.

## Deliverables
- Standard artifact directory under `test-results/` for:
  - render trace
  - event macro / event stream
  - last N frame snapshots (text + ANSI)
  - cass.log excerpt
  - environment/capabilities snapshot
- Ensure artifacts are uploaded by CI job (where workflows allow).

## Acceptance Criteria
- A failure in PTY e2e test produces a bundle without additional manual steps.
- Bundles are bounded in size (cap frames and log length).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424442145Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424415746Z","close_reason":"Implemented CI failure artifacts for TUI tests: TuiFailureDump utility in tests/util/mod.rs with frame snapshot capture (text + ANSI), render timing JSONL, event stream, system info, bounded artifact sizes (max 10 frames, 64KB logs). Auto-captures on ftui snapshot assertion failures. Constants TUI_DUMP_MAX_FRAMES and TUI_DUMP_MAX_LOG_BYTES. Integrates with existing trace bundle format from 2noh9.4.3. Also fixed compilation issues from concurrent agent work (consent dialog borrow error, clippy lints).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:41.298861163Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","title":"Task: Remove Ratatui from cass (Cargo.toml, src/ui, tests) and verify no references remain","description":"## Goal
Make Ratatui a zero-dependency for cass.

## Deliverables
- Remove `ratatui` dependency from `Cargo.toml`.
- Replace all Ratatui types/usages in:
  - `src/ui/*`
  - `tests/*` (ui-related)
- Ensure `rg -n "ratatui"` finds no remaining references (except maybe historical docs if intentionally kept).

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check --all-targets` passes.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
- `cargo test` passes.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:37.401864211Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.630131878Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","migration","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.630070804Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.672268624Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.979509776Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.302278052Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.704848885Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.023478977Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.343587005Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.061247429Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.381951157Z","c
